sections.paragraph:
Original: תּענגה תּענג תּענוּג

Transliteration: ta‛ănûg ta‛ănûg ta‛ănûgâh

Phonetic: tah-an-oog'

BDB Definition:

  1. daintiness, luxury, exquisite delight, pleasantness, delight, comfort
    1. luxury
    2. dainty
    3. delight

Origin: from H6026

TWOT entry: 1648c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
